scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix apps/frontend run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0" "bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && uv run onemoon-backend'"
scripts.dev:restart: bash -lc '/home/rongfei/.codex/skills/background-dev-server/scripts/stop_background_dev.sh onemoon-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; /home/rongfei/.codex/skills/background-dev-server/scripts/start_background_dev.sh onemoon-dev "$PWD" npm run dev'
